rationale: For the scope angle both reviews block and identify the same decisive issues — premature Layer 6 typeclasses with True-stub fields, the prohibited bundling in AffineAlgGroup, and the vacuous IsUnipotent — all confirmable directly in the diff, so acting on either yields the same scoped-down PR. Review 2's extra GroupLike-not-points-functor note is a correctness detail rather than a scope distinction, leaving the resulting PRs equally good.
